summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Panshi Restaurant website. Backend API testing achieved 88.9% success rate with 2 security issues identified. Frontend testing successful for all public pages, navigation, mobile responsiveness, and WhatsApp integration. Admin login functionality has authentication issues preventing access to admin dashboard.

critical_bugs.impact: Security vulnerability - unauthorized access to admin blog data
Security vulnerability - unauthorized access to customer contact messages

auth_issues.issue: Admin login fails in frontend but works in backend testing
auth_issues.impact: Admin cannot access dashboard through UI
auth_issues.symptoms: Login form shows 'SIGNING IN...' state indefinitely, 401 errors in console

integration_issues.issue: Login form submission fails with 401 error
integration_issues.symptoms: Form stays in loading state, no redirect to admin dashboard

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section and Bengali text
Navigation works between all pages (Home, Menu, Blog, About, Contact)
Menu page displays products with category filters and search
Blog page loads and displays blog posts
Contact page form has all required fields
WhatsApp floating button visible and functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin login authentication flow - frontend login fails while backend API works
Secure admin endpoints /api/blogs/all and /api/contacts to require authentication
Investigate cookie-based authentication vs token-based auth mismatch between frontend and backend
